projects.title: BuiltByGervonte
projects.description: Rebranded home for BuiltByGervonte LLC with refreshed SEO, structured data, brand assets, and performance-minded Next.js theming.
projects.longDescription: The former Portfolio AI site is now the official BuiltByGervonte studio home page. It blends AI-assisted build workflows with a refreshed brand system, expanded structured data (Organization + Person schemas), updated sitemap/robots, and regenerated favicon/touch icons. The experience keeps the sakura/ocean theming, deep technical write-ups, and CI/CD rigor while centering the studio's product work and services.
achievements: Rebranded SEO metadata, sitemaps, and manifest for BuiltByGervonte
Organization + Person structured data with linked @id graph
Regenerated favicon, SVG, and Apple touch icons with proper color profiles
Dynamic sakura/ocean themes with Mantine UI and Framer Motion
CI/CD with scheduled deploys, PR automation, and branch protection
Interactive technical deep-dives and resume-driven data display

analytics.description: Tracks user behavior, page views, and engagement patterns to understand user preferences.

monitoring.description: Monitors system health, uptime, and error rates to ensure reliable performance.

screenshots.caption: Scheduled Daily Deploy workflow showing successful runs at 10:13 AM with ~2 minute duration
screenshots.alt: GitHub Actions scheduled deployment workflow runs

screenshots.caption: CI/CD pipeline status showing automated checks, deployment status, and merge readiness
screenshots.alt: GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline status and checks

cicd.description: Automated pipeline that tests, builds, and deploys code with daily scheduled releases.
workflows: Scheduled Daily Deploy (2:00 PM UTC / 10:00 AM EST)
automation: Auto-create PRs from preview to main

architecture.description: Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Mantine UI, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD.
architecture.deployment: Vercel with CDN + Scheduled GitHub Actions
architecture.workflow: Feature Branch → Preview → Scheduled Main Deploy → Auto-sync Preview

projects.title: Audio Key BPM Analyzer AI
projects.description: KIRO/AI generated music tool that helps music producers, engineers and artists by analyzing the key and BPM of an instrumental file. Commonly used for fine tuning autotune and pitch correction applications.
projects.longDescription: This tool is comparable in output to Tunebat.com's key and bpm analyzer. The waveform display was inspired by Soundcloud and the algorithm behind the analysis uses essentia.js. It's main use case is for analyzing instrumental music files.
achievements: AI-assisted development taking concept to deployment
Responsive design with Chakra UI components
Audio key and BPM analysis with essentia.js

analytics.description: Tracks user engagement and audio processing metrics including files processed.

monitoring.description: Monitors audio processing errors and system health for reliable analysis.

cicd.description: Automated pipeline that tests, builds, and deploys with continuous integration.

architecture.description: Built with Vite, Chakra UI, Essentia.js for audio analysis, and Web Audio API.

projects.title: Rainy Day
projects.description:
Rainy Day is a financial clarity app built with the banking realities of The Bahamas (and broader Caribbean region) in mind.

At this stage, it is built to securely support FirstCaribbean (FCIB) through statement ingestion as well as managing cash manually, with plans to expand to PDF support, other local banks (starting with ScotiaBank in the next upcoming release), and hybrid (Plaid-accessible) users combining and utilizing pre-existing data sources as the product grows.
projects.longDescription: Rainy Day is meant to help its users save and manage their money through industry standard software UI/UX and is currently at [v0.1.0/MVP]. By supporting data aggregation for local banks such as FirstCaribbean (FCIB) and manually tracking cash, financial clarity is provided through an overview dashboard with insights and the ability to securely manage transactions, statements, categories, and accounts. Additional technical details are included below.
achievements: Shipped normalized FirstCaribbean (FCIB) CSV statement ingestion and manual cash transactions, along with categorization, charts and summaries.
Built a spreadsheet-like workflow with upload, searchable transaction review, filters, and server-side pagination and sorting
Delivered management pages for statements, categories, accounts, and manual cash account support
Released overview, auth, settings, and stability polish while deferring richer forecasting, additional banks and review logic to [v0.2.0]

product.description:
Rainy Day [v0.1.0] shipped FirstCaribbean (FCIB) CSV ingestion into a normalized Supabase model, spreadsheet-first upload and transaction review flows, management pages for statements, categories, and accounts, a calm overview dashboard with minimal insights, and baseline auth and settings. Management is done through spreadsheet-like interfaces with searchable transaction review, filters, and server-side pagination and sorting.

More complex features including automated categorization and additional local banks have been deferred in order to ship the Minimum Viable Prototype (MVP)

It has been built with structure using Linear and Mintlify and architected to scale. Product and business decisions have been sharpened through consistent strategic reading.

AI is passively used in the form of Github Copilot for PR reviews, Codex/ChatGPT along with the newly introduced Linear MCP to help further define product decisions  as well as break tasks down into steps for me to code or accomplish by manually when needed, similar to an in-house staff/senior engineer. (Manual tasks such as setting up auth, databases, hosted product documentation, etc.)

screenshots.caption: Authentication flow for signing into Rainy Day
Overview dashboard with spending, income, and recent transactions
Transactions page for reviewing imported financial activity
Statements page for uploaded documents and statement history
